title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Roger, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We haven't done anything wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's because you haven't done anything yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen, I stopped you to talk about a "prophecy"! Something only a man of your caliber could achieve!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The doors to fishman Island will be opened for everyone and the border between our worlds will be no more!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you're here and you have the power

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to des- Troy the entry to the island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sir Neptune!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can't believe it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our army has suffered some damage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The door that allows ships into the harbor has also suffered some damage!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger, did you hit it?...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a hole near the border bubble too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Go and patch it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the "day of the disaster" has finally come...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit! We've been standing right here! It wasn't us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The Day of Disaster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shyearly (Age 3)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...will only happen after the mermaid Princess is born.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: mermaid princess? Now that's new!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the king is going to have a daughter in the future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we throw a party now or wait until she's born?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, I'm not even married.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only became King a few months ago too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But Sir Neptune, everyone knows that shyarily...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Had a prophecy, containing informations about how a carp will marry into the Royal Family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh, right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And since then, Otohime has been leading political demonstrations in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Demanding the King to Better Our Relationship with Humans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What kind of prophecy is that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you've witnessed,the whole country is caught up in that child's prophecy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: neptune, for the last time,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got nothing to do with this chaos!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second! There are two poneglyphs in this forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: One of them doesn't seem important, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, the other is an apology from a man named Joyboy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must say, I'm impressed you can read those!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: more importantly, the "Weapon that could shake the entire world" isn't here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The poneGlyph from Sky Island said it would be here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, about that. I recently heard one of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shyarily's prophecy concerning that weapon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Every 100 years, position - the God of the sea is reborn. His hidden power to destroy the world lays dormant inside a pure maiden."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To put it simply, it's highly likely that my daughter is the weapon that will destroy the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's as far as this 'prophecy' goes! I have no idea of what kind of person she will be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So passion is a mermaid, huh? I could give you some tips on fatherhood if you want.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey shyarily, you got any other prophecy? Maybe you can tell us when passion will be born?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 10 years.

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: There you have it, Roger: 10 years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, I'm disappointed and concerned that you're showing so much interest in my family affairs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: neptune, what we're after is the treasure left behind by the weapon's creator.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not interested in the weapon, right Roger?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never said something like that, did I?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, don't worry, I don't have enough time left to come back and steal your shaggy daughter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who said she'll be shaggy?!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
